add_executable(pico_sdk_blink_pico2 main.c)

target_link_libraries(pico_sdk_blink_pico2
    pico_stdlib
)

pico_set_program_name(pico_sdk_blink_pico2 "PicoSdkBlinkPico2")
pico_set_program_version(pico_sdk_blink_pico2 "1.0")

pico_enable_stdio_usb(pico_sdk_blink_pico2 1)
pico_enable_stdio_uart(pico_sdk_blink_pico2 0)

# pico_add_extra_outputs disabled: bundled picotool too old for rp2350
# UF2 is generated by picotool after build (see build.sh)
